creator: vendion@gmail.com
text:
Created attachment 221128
Yadm version 3.0.0 update

The attached patch updates yadm to version 3.0.0 as well as adds a pkg-message file with messages on upgrade to instruct the user upon upgrading they should run [code]yadm upgrade[/code] to move the yadm data directories and files to their new location.
